settings.editor: From end of lease cleans to commercial offices and sparkling windows - Trogen Facility Services delivers spotless results across all of Melbourne. Bond-back guarantee included.
We offer a full range of cleaning services tailored to your needs. Every job comes with our quality guarantee.
Professional internal and external window cleaning. Streak-free results every time for homes and businesses.
Reliable cleaning for offices, retail spaces, and commercial properties. Flexible scheduling to suit your hours.
Deep cleaning for spring cleans, pre-sale preparation, post-renovation cleanup, or whenever you need a fresh start.
Thorough bond-back cleaning from $250. Get your full deposit returned with our comprehensive end of lease service.

settings.title: How much does an end of lease clean cost?

settings.editor: Our end of lease cleaning starts from $250 for a 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom property with steam clean included. Larger properties are priced based on bedrooms, bathrooms, and any add-ons. Message us on WhatsApp for an instant quote.

settings.title: Do you guarantee I will get my bond back?

settings.editor: Yes. We provide a bond-back guarantee on all end of lease cleans. If your agent requests a re-clean within 72 hours, we will return and address it at no extra cost.

settings.title: What areas in Melbourne do you service?

settings.editor: We service all Melbourne metropolitan areas including eastern, south-eastern, and CBD suburbs. Contact us to confirm availability in your area.

settings.title: How do I book a cleaning?

settings.editor: The fastest way is via WhatsApp - just tap the green button on this page. You can also call us on 0426 047 075. We usually respond within a few hours.
Yes. We hold IICRC Water Restoration Technician certification and carry full public liability insurance for your peace of mind.

settings.title: What add-on services do you offer?

settings.editor: We offer balcony cleaning, garage cleaning, and wall washing as add-ons to any of our cleaning packages. Ask us for pricing when you get your quote.
Get your free, no-obligation quote today. Call, WhatsApp, or fill out our form - we respond fast.
